g.text: Run provider end-to-end tests against a deployed Airflow stack.
Defaults to the PROD image (current Airflow + providers from sources). Pass
released Airflow version with the current providers installed from main.
Name of the image to verify (overrides
Python major/minor version used in Airflow image for images.
Run against a released Airflow version (e.g. 3.0.6) with current providers from
main, instead of the default PROD image. Builds a lightweight image from
Skip deletion of docker-compose instance after the test
Skip mounting local volumes - useful when we do not want to iterate with
modified local files. For example, when the PROD image is built from packages
Shuts down the docker-compose setup without running any tests. Useful to make
Whether to include outputs of successful runs (not shown by default).
GitHub repository used to pull, push run images.
Print verbose information about performed steps.
If dry-run is set, commands are only printed, not executed.
